name: hive-mcp-mining
description: MCP server for the Hive Mining vertical. 11 tools: 8 existing (hashrate routing, Boltz BTC↔USDC payout, Bortlesboat fee intel) + 3 new MOS tools (mos.query_hashrate, mos.query_payouts, mos.book_hashrate) wrapping the Tether MiningOS orchestration layer. Real rails — no mocks. Three gates on every booking.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
